caption: A man wearing a dark blue baseball cap with a wing logo and a dark t-shirt with the words "CHECK IT!" on the chest is seated in a recording studio. He is wearing over-ear headphones and speaking into a professional condenser microphone equipped with a pop filter. Behind him, a white banner features the word "HUSTLE" and a row of gold stars. The background also includes a screen and partially visible text that reads "ROSS TALK 101". On-screen overlays include a logo on the left side that says "TALK 101 PODCAST" and a red and white graphic on the right that reads "ROSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly leaning forward toward the microphone, with minimal movement in his posture and facial expression as he continues to speak.
